case_title: KAITLIN COURT, LP VS. AUGUST BYUN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAITLIN COURT, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYUN, AUGUST AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 887 BUSH STREET, UNIT NUMBER 209, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS TO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BYUN, AUGUST AN INDIVIDUAL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAITLIN COURT, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT BYUN, AUGUST AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAITLIN COURT, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTERSHIP SERVED AUG-31-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAITLIN COURT, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTERSHIP SERVED AUG-31-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BYUN, AUGUST AN INDIVIDUAL
